pattern: 'Document' does not contain a definition for 'IsTagged'
fix_guidance:
CRITICAL API FIX: Document.IsTagged does NOT exist in Aspose.PDF.
  - To check if tagged: use (doc.TaggedContent != null)
  - To get tagged content: var taggedContent = doc.TaggedContent;
  - Do NOT use doc.IsTagged — this property does not exist.

pattern: 'ITaggedContent' does not contain a definition for '(Language|Title)'
fix_guidance:
CRITICAL API FIX: ITaggedContent.Language and ITaggedContent.Title are NOT direct properties.
  - Use taggedContent.SetLanguage("en-US") instead of taggedContent.Language = "en-US"
  - Use taggedContent.SetTitle("...") instead of taggedContent.Title = "..."
  - These are setter methods, not properties.

pattern: 'Element' does not contain a definition for '(ActualText|AlternativeText|Alt|Lang)'
fix_guidance:
CRITICAL API FIX: Element does not have ActualText/AlternativeText properties directly.
  - Cast Element to StructureElement first: var se = (StructureElement)element;
  - Then access: se.ActualText, se.AlternativeText, se.Language
  - Use Aspose.Pdf.LogicalStructure.StructureElement, NOT Aspose.Pdf.Structure.Element.

pattern: 'Element' is an ambiguous reference between.*LogicalStructure.*Structure
fix_guidance:
CRITICAL: 'Element' is ambiguous. Use fully qualified name:
  - Use Aspose.Pdf.LogicalStructure.Element (for tagged PDF structure)
  - Do NOT use Aspose.Pdf.Structure.Element
  - For casting: (Aspose.Pdf.LogicalStructure.StructureElement)element

pattern: 'XImage' does not contain a definition for '(AlternativeText|TryGetAlternativeText)'
fix_guidance:
API FIX: XImage does not have AlternativeText property.
  - To extract images, use: page.Resources.Images[index]
  - To save an image: xImage.Save(stream)
  - Alt text for images is stored in the tagged structure, not on XImage itself.

pattern: 'Saving' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf'
fix_guidance:
CRITICAL: The namespace Aspose.Pdf.Saving does NOT exist.
  - Remove 'using Aspose.Pdf.Saving;'
  - Save options classes are in the Aspose.Pdf namespace directly:
    Aspose.Pdf.DocSaveOptions, Aspose.Pdf.HtmlSaveOptions, etc.

pattern: Cannot convert type.*'Aspose\.Pdf\.LogicalStructure\.Element' to 'Aspose\.Pdf\.Structure\.Element'
fix_guidance:
TYPE MISMATCH: Do not mix LogicalStructure.Element and Structure.Element.
  - Use only Aspose.Pdf.LogicalStructure namespace for tagged content.
  - Cast to Aspose.Pdf.LogicalStructure.StructureElement
  - Remove 'using Aspose.Pdf.Structure;' if present.

pattern: 'ITaggedContent' does not exist in the namespace 'Aspose\.Pdf'
fix_guidance:
NAMESPACE FIX: ITaggedContent is in Aspose.Pdf.Tagged namespace.
  - Add 'using Aspose.Pdf.Tagged;'
  - Access via: Aspose.Pdf.Tagged.ITaggedContent
  - Get instance: doc.TaggedContent (returns ITaggedContent)

pattern: '(?:Pdf|Document)Comparer' does not contain a definition for
fix_guidance:
CRITICAL API FIX: PdfComparer / DocumentComparer method names.
  - Use Aspose.Pdf.Comparison.PdfComparer for comparing PDF documents.
  - To compare: var comparer = new Aspose.Pdf.Comparison.PdfComparer();
  - Methods: comparer.Compare(doc1, doc2) — returns comparison result.
  - Do NOT use non-existent methods like ComparePages, GetDifferences, etc.

pattern: 'GraphicalPdfComparer' does not contain a definition for
fix_guidance:
CRITICAL API FIX: GraphicalPdfComparer available methods.
  - Use Aspose.Pdf.Comparison.GraphicalPdfComparer for visual comparison.
  - var comparer = new Aspose.Pdf.Comparison.GraphicalPdfComparer();
  - Use comparer.CompareDocumentsPageByPage(doc1, doc2, outputDir) to compare.
  - Use comparer.CompareDocumentsToPdf(doc1, doc2, outputPath) for PDF output.
  - Do NOT call non-existent methods.

pattern: (?:Comparison|Comparer|ComparisonOptions).*does not exist in the namespace
fix_guidance:
NAMESPACE FIX: PDF Comparison classes are in Aspose.Pdf.Comparison namespace.
  - Add 'using Aspose.Pdf.Comparison;'
  - Classes: PdfComparer, GraphicalPdfComparer, ComparisonOptions
  - Do NOT use Aspose.Pdf.Compare or Aspose.Pdf.Comparing — they don't exist.

pattern: Cannot implicitly convert type.*'Aspose\.Pdf\.Comparison\.
fix_guidance:
TYPE MISMATCH in PDF comparison result handling.
  - CompareDocumentsToPdf returns void — it writes directly to a file.
  - CompareDocumentsPageByPage returns void — it writes to a directory.
  - Do NOT try to assign the result to a variable. Just call the method.
  - Example: comparer.CompareDocumentsToPdf(doc1, doc2, "result.pdf");

pattern: 'ComparisonOptions' does not contain a definition for
fix_guidance:
API FIX: ComparisonOptions properties.
  - Use: var options = new ComparisonOptions();
  - Valid: options.EditOperationsOrder (EditOperationsOrder enum)
  - Valid: options.ExcludeAreas (list of Rectangle areas to exclude)
  - Do NOT use non-existent properties like Tolerance, Mode, etc.

pattern: no argument given that corresponds to the required parameter.*of 'Layer\(
fix_guidance:
CRITICAL API FIX: Layer constructor requires a name parameter.
  - Use: var layer = new Aspose.Pdf.Layer("layerId", "Layer Name");
  - The Layer constructor takes (string id, string name) — both required.
  - Do NOT use new Layer() without arguments.

pattern: 'Layer\.Name' cannot be assigned to.*read only
'(?:Layer|Document)' does not contain a definition for '(?:Layers|AddText|Operators)'
no argument given that corresponds to the required parameter.*of 'CrashReport(?:Options)?\(
fix_guidance:
CRITICAL API FIX: CrashReportOptions requires an Exception parameter.
  - Use: var options = new CrashReportOptions(exception);
  - The constructor requires a System.Exception object.
  - Wrap in try/catch to capture the exception first.

pattern: 'CrashReportOptions' does not contain a definition for '(?:OutputFile|Output)'
fix_guidance:
API FIX: CrashReportOptions does not have OutputFile.
  - Use CrashReportOptions.CrashReportDirectory for output dir.
  - The report file path is managed by the generator.
  - Do NOT use options.OutputFile or options.Output.

pattern: 'CrashReportOptions\.Exception' cannot be assigned to.*read only
'Heading' does not contain a definition for '(?:Title|IsInToc|TocPage)'
'TableOfContents' could not be found
fix_guidance:
CRITICAL: No TableOfContents class in Aspose.PDF.
  - To create TOC: use TocInfo on a Page: page.TocInfo = new TocInfo();
  - Then add Heading objects to page.Paragraphs.
  - Do NOT look for TableOfContents — it does not exist.

pattern: Cannot.*convert type.*'TextSegment\[\]' to '.*TextSegmentCollection'
fix_guidance:
TYPE MISMATCH: TextSegment[] vs TextSegmentCollection.
  - TextFragment.Segments is TextSegmentCollection, not an array.
  - Use: textFragment.Segments.Add(new TextSegment("text"));
  - Do NOT assign an array to Segments.
